texto: Society can be a bitch.""And is by no means always right. Society can't know you like you know yourself. So don't let society be the judge of your actions. Only you can judge you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a G.B. Gordon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Society can be a bitch.""And is by no means always right. Society can't know you like you know yo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, advice, society pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de society.
